11683 | def find_iced_signature():
11684 |     cargo_home = os.environ.get('CARGO_HOME', os.path.expanduser('~/.cargo'))
11685 |     registry_src = os.path.join(cargo_home, 'registry', 'src')
11686 |     
11687 |     for root, dirs, files in os.walk(registry_src):
11688 |         if 'iced-0.14' in root or 'iced-0.13' in root:
11689 |             if 'application.rs' in files:
11690 |                 filepath = os.path.join(root, 'application.rs')
11691 |                 with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
11692 |                     content = f.read()
11693 |                     print(f"Found {filepath}")
11694 |                     lines = content.split('\n')
11695 |                     for i, l in enumerate(lines):
11696 |                         if 'pub fn application<' in l or 'pub fn application(' in l:
11697 |                             print("\n".join(lines[i-2:i+15]))
11698 |                             return
11699 |     print("Could not find iced application source.")
11700 | 
11701 | find_iced_signature()
11702 | ```

11896 | #[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
11897 | pub fn set_auto_start(enable: bool, app_name: &str, exe_path: &str) -> Result<(), String> {
11898 |     use winreg::enums::*;
11899 |     use winreg::RegKey;
11900 | 
11901 |     let hkcu = RegKey::predef(HKEY_CURRENT_USER);
11902 |     let run_key = hkcu
11903 |         .open_subkey_with_flags(
11904 |             r"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run",
11905 |             KEY_ALL_ACCESS,
11906 |         )
11907 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11908 | 
11909 |     if enable {
11910 |         run_key
11911 |             .set_value(app_name, &exe_path)
11912 |             .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11913 |     } else {
11914 |         let _ = run_key.delete_value(app_name);
11915 |     }
11916 |     Ok(())
11917 | }
11918 | 
11919 | #[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
11920 | pub fn is_auto_start_enabled(app_name: &str) -> Result<bool, String> {
11921 |     use winreg::enums::*;
11922 |     use winreg::RegKey;
11923 | 
11924 |     let hkcu = RegKey::predef(HKEY_CURRENT_USER);
11925 |     let run_key = hkcu
11926 |         .open_subkey(r"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run")
11927 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11928 | 
11929 |     match run_key.get_value::<String, _>(app_name) {
11930 |         Ok(_) => Ok(true),
11931 |         Err(_) => Ok(false),
11932 |     }
11933 | }
11934 | 
11935 | #[cfg(not(target_os = "windows"))]
11936 | pub fn set_auto_start(_enable: bool, _app_name: &str, _exe_path: &str) -> Result<(), String> {
11937 |     Err("Auto-start not implemented for this platform".to_string())
11938 | }
11939 | 
11940 | #[cfg(not(target_os = "windows"))]
11941 | pub fn is_auto_start_enabled(_app_name: &str) -> Result<bool, String> {
11942 |     Ok(false)
11943 | }
11944 | ```

11951 | ```rust
11952 | use crate::indexer::searcher::SearchResult;
11953 | use std::fs::File;
11954 | use std::io::Write;
11955 | 
11956 | pub fn export_results_csv(results: &[SearchResult], path: &str) -> Result<(), String> {
11957 |     let mut file = File::create(path).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11958 |     writeln!(file, "Score,File Path,Title").map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11959 |     for r in results {
11960 |         let title = r.title.as_deref().unwrap_or("");
11961 |         writeln!(file, "{},{},{}", r.score, r.file_path, title).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11962 |     }
11963 |     Ok(())
11964 | }
11965 | 
11966 | pub fn export_results_json(results: &[SearchResult], path: &str) -> Result<(), String> {
11967 |     let json = serde_json::to_string_pretty(results).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11968 |     std::fs::write(path, json).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
11969 |     Ok(())
11970 | }
11971 | ```

11987 | pub async fn start_indexing_internal(path: String, state: Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
11988 |     let path = PathBuf::from(path); // Modified this line
11989 |     let indexer = state.indexer.clone();
11990 |     let metadata_db = state.metadata_db.clone();
11991 |     let settings = state.settings_manager.load().unwrap_or_default();
11992 | 
11993 |     let mut exclude_patterns = settings.exclude_patterns.clone();
11994 |     for folder in &settings.exclude_folders {
11995 |         exclude_patterns.push(folder.clone());
11996 |     }
11997 | 
11998 |     let progress_tx = state.progress_tx.clone();
11999 | 
12000 |     tokio::spawn(async move {
12001 |         let scanner = Scanner::new(
12002 |             indexer,
12003 |             metadata_db,
12004 |             state.filename_index.clone(),
12005 |             Some(progress_tx),
12006 |             settings,
12007 |         );
12008 |         if let Err(e) = scanner.scan_directory(path, exclude_patterns).await {
12009 |             error!("Indexing error: {}", e);
12010 |         }
12011 |     });
12012 | 
12013 |     Ok(())
12014 | }
12015 | 
12016 | pub async fn get_index_status_internal() -> Result<IndexStatus, String> {
12017 |     Ok(IndexStatus {
12018 |         status: "idle".to_string(),
12019 |         files_indexed: 0,
12020 |     })
12021 | }
12022 |

12024 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12025 | ) -> Result<IndexStatistics, String> {
12026 |     state.indexer.get_statistics().map_err(|e| e.to_string())
12027 | }
12028 | 
12029 | pub async fn get_recent_files_internal(
12030 |     limit: usize,
12031 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12032 | ) -> Result<Vec<RecentFile>, String> {

12034 |         .metadata_db
12035 |         .get_recent_files(limit)
12036 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12037 |     Ok(files

12039 |         .map(|(p, t, m, s)| RecentFile {
12040 |             path: p,
12041 |             title: t,
12042 |             modified: m,
12043 |             size: s,
12044 |         })
12045 |         .collect())

12126 | use crate::commands::AppState;
12127 | use crate::indexer::searcher::SearchResult;

12130 | use std::sync::Arc;
12131 | 
12132 | pub async fn search_query_internal(
12133 |     query: String,
12134 |     limit: usize,
12135 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12136 |     min_size: Option<u64>,
12137 |     max_size: Option<u64>,
12138 |     file_extensions: Option<Vec<String>>,
12139 | ) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>, String> {
12140 |     state
12141 |         .indexer
12142 |         .search(
12143 |             &query,
12144 |             limit,
12145 |             min_size,
12146 |             max_size,
12147 |             file_extensions.as_deref(),
12148 |         )
12149 |         .await
12150 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())
12151 | }
12152 | 
12153 | pub async fn get_file_preview_internal(path: String) -> Result<String, String> {
12154 |     let path = std::path::PathBuf::from(path);
12155 |     match parse_file(&path) {
12156 |         Ok(doc) => Ok(doc.content[..std::cmp::min(doc.content.len(), 10000)].to_string()),
12157 |         Err(e) => Err(e.to_string()),
12158 |     }
12159 | }
12160 | 
12161 | pub async fn get_file_preview_highlighted_internal(
12162 |     path: String,
12163 |     query: String,
12164 | ) -> Result<PreviewResult, String> {
12165 |     use crate::indexer::query_parser::extract_highlight_terms;
12166 |     let path = std::path::PathBuf::from(path);
12167 |     let matched_terms = extract_highlight_terms(&query);
12168 |     match parse_file(&path) {
12169 |         Ok(doc) => Ok(PreviewResult {
12170 |             content: doc.content[..std::cmp::min(doc.content.len(), 10000)].to_string(),
12171 |             matched_terms,
12172 |         }),
12173 |         Err(e) => Err(e.to_string()),
12174 |     }
12175 | }
12176 | 
12177 | pub async fn search_filenames_internal(
12178 |     query: String,
12179 |     limit: usize,
12180 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12181 | ) -> Result<Vec<FilenameSearchResult>, String> {
12182 |     if let Some(ref filename_index) = state.filename_index {
12183 |         filename_index
12184 |             .search(&query, limit)
12185 |             .map(|results| {
12186 |                 results
12187 |                     .into_iter()
12188 |                     .map(|r| FilenameSearchResult {
12189 |                         file_path: r.file_path,
12190 |                         file_name: r.file_name,
12191 |                     })
12192 |                     .collect()
12193 |             })
12194 |             .map_err(|e| e.to_string())
12195 |     } else {
12196 |         Err("Filename index not initialized".to_string())
12197 |     }
12198 | }
12199 | 
12200 | pub async fn get_filename_index_stats_internal(
12201 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12202 | ) -> Result<FilenameIndexStats, String> {
12203 |     if let Some(ref filename_index) = state.filename_index {
12204 |         let stats = filename_index.get_stats().map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12205 |         Ok(FilenameIndexStats {
12206 |             total_files: stats.total_files,
12207 |             index_size_bytes: stats.index_size_bytes,
12208 |         })
12209 |     } else {
12210 |         Err("Filename index not initialized".to_string())
12211 |     }
12212 | }
12213 | ```

12221 | use crate::commands::AppState;

12226 | pub fn get_settings_internal(state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<AppSettings, String> {
12227 |     Ok(state.settings_cache.read().unwrap().clone())
12228 | }
12229 | 
12230 | pub fn save_settings_internal(settings: AppSettings, state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12231 |     *state.settings_cache.write().unwrap() = settings.clone();
12232 |     state
12233 |         .settings_manager
12234 |         .save(&settings)
12235 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12236 | 
12237 |     let mut watcher = state.watcher.lock().unwrap();
12238 |     watcher
12239 |         .update_watch_list(settings.index_dirs)
12240 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12241 | 
12242 |     Ok(())
12243 | }
12244 | 
12245 | pub fn get_recent_searches_internal(state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<Vec<String>, String> {
12246 |     Ok(state
12247 |         .settings_cache
12248 |         .read()
12249 |         .unwrap()
12250 |         .recent_searches
12251 |         .clone()
12252 |         .unwrap_or_default())
12253 | }
12254 | 
12255 | pub fn add_recent_search_internal(query: String, state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12256 |     let mut cache = state.settings_cache.write().unwrap();
12257 | 
12258 |     let mut recent = cache.recent_searches.clone().unwrap_or_default();
12259 |     recent.retain(|q| q != &query);
12260 |     recent.insert(0, query);
12261 |     recent.truncate(10);
12262 | 
12263 |     cache.recent_searches = Some(recent);
12264 |     state
12265 |         .settings_manager
12266 |         .save(&cache)
12267 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12268 | 
12269 |     Ok(())
12270 | }
12271 | 
12272 | pub fn clear_recent_searches_internal(state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12273 |     let mut cache = state.settings_cache.write().unwrap();
12274 |     cache.recent_searches = Some(vec![]);
12275 |     state
12276 |         .settings_manager
12277 |         .save(&cache)
12278 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12279 |     Ok(())
12280 | }
12281 | 
12282 | pub fn add_search_history_internal(query: String, state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12283 |     let mut cache = state.settings_cache.write().unwrap();
12284 |     let mut history = cache.search_history.clone().unwrap_or_default();
12285 | 
12286 |     let mut found = false;
12287 |     for item in &mut history {
12288 |         if item.query == query {
12289 |             item.frequency += 1;
12290 |             item.last_used = std::time::SystemTime::now()
12291 |                 .duration_since(std::time::SystemTime::UNIX_EPOCH)
12292 |                 .unwrap()
12293 |                 .as_secs();
12294 |             found = true;
12295 |             break;
12296 |         }
12297 |     }
12298 | 
12299 |     if !found {
12300 |         history.insert(
12301 |             0,
12302 |             crate::settings::SearchHistoryItem {
12303 |                 query,
12304 |                 frequency: 1,
12305 |                 last_used: std::time::SystemTime::now()
12306 |                     .duration_since(std::time::SystemTime::UNIX_EPOCH)
12307 |                     .unwrap()
12308 |                     .as_secs(),
12309 |             },
12310 |         );
12311 |     }
12312 | 
12313 |     history.sort_by(|a, b| b.frequency.cmp(&a.frequency));
12314 |     history.truncate(50);
12315 | 
12316 |     cache.search_history = Some(history);
12317 |     state
12318 |         .settings_manager
12319 |         .save(&cache)
12320 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12321 | 
12322 |     Ok(())
12323 | }
12324 | 
12325 | pub fn get_search_history_internal(
12326 |     limit: usize,
12327 |     state: &Arc<AppState>,
12328 | ) -> Result<Vec<SearchHistoryItem>, String> {
12329 |     let mut history = state
12330 |         .settings_cache
12331 |         .read()
12332 |         .unwrap()
12333 |         .search_history
12334 |         .clone()
12335 |         .unwrap_or_default();
12336 |     history.truncate(limit);
12337 | 
12338 |     Ok(history)
12339 | }
12340 | 
12341 | pub fn pin_file_internal(path: String, state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12342 |     let mut cache = state.settings_cache.write().unwrap();
12343 |     if !cache.pinned_files.contains(&path) {
12344 |         cache.pinned_files.push(path);
12345 |         state
12346 |             .settings_manager
12347 |             .save(&cache)
12348 |             .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12349 |     }
12350 |     Ok(())
12351 | }
12352 | 
12353 | pub fn unpin_file_internal(path: String, state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<(), String> {
12354 |     let mut cache = state.settings_cache.write().unwrap();
12355 |     cache.pinned_files.retain(|p| p != &path);
12356 |     state
12357 |         .settings_manager
12358 |         .save(&cache)
12359 |         .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12360 |     Ok(())
12361 | }
12362 | 
12363 | pub fn get_pinned_files_internal(state: &Arc<AppState>) -> Result<Vec<String>, String> {
12364 |     Ok(state.settings_cache.read().unwrap().pinned_files.clone())
12365 | }
12366 | ```

12376 | pub fn get_home_dir_internal() -> Result<String, String> {
12377 |     dirs::home_dir()
12378 |         .map(|p| p.to_string_lossy().to_string())
12379 |         .ok_or_else(|| "Could not determine home directory".to_string())
12380 | }
12381 | 
12382 | pub fn open_folder_internal(path: String) -> Result<(), String> {
12383 |     #[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
12384 |     {
12385 |         use std::process::Command;
12386 |         Command::new("explorer")
12387 |             .arg("/select,")
12388 |             .arg(path)
12389 |             .spawn()
12390 |             .map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12391 |         Ok(())
12392 |     }
12393 |     #[cfg(not(target_os = "windows"))]
12394 |     {
12395 |         let path = std::path::PathBuf::from(path);
12396 |         if let Some(parent) = path.parent() {
12397 |             opener::reveal(parent).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12398 |         }
12399 |         Ok(())
12400 |     }
12401 | }
12402 | 
12403 | pub async fn select_folder_internal() -> Result<Option<String>, String> {
12404 |     let handle = rfd::AsyncFileDialog::new()
12405 |         .set_title("Select Folder to Index")
12406 |         .pick_folder()
12407 |         .await;
12408 |     Ok(handle.map(|h| h.path().to_string_lossy().to_string()))
12409 | }
12410 | 
12411 | pub fn copy_to_clipboard_internal(text: String) -> Result<(), String> {
12412 |     use arboard::Clipboard;
12413 |     let mut clipboard = Clipboard::new().map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12414 |     clipboard.set_text(text).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
12415 |     Ok(())
12416 | }
12417 | 
12418 | pub async fn export_results_internal(
12419 |     results: Vec<SearchResult>,
12420 |     format: String,
12421 | ) -> Result<(), String> {
12422 |     let mut dialog = rfd::AsyncFileDialog::new()
12423 |         .set_title("Export Search Results")
12424 |         .set_file_name(format!("flash_search_results.{}", format));
12425 | 
12426 |     if format == "csv" {
12427 |         dialog = dialog.add_filter("CSV File", &["csv"]);
12428 |     } else if format == "json" {
12429 |         dialog = dialog.add_filter("JSON File", &["json"]);
12430 |     }
12431 | 
12432 |     if let Some(handle) = dialog.save_file().await {
12433 |         let path = handle.path().to_string_lossy().to_string();
12434 |         if format == "csv" {
12435 |             crate::commands::export_results_csv(&results, &path)?;
12436 |         } else if format == "json" {
12437 |             crate::commands::export_results_json(&results, &path)?;
12438 |         }
12439 |     }
12440 | 
12441 |     Ok(())
12442 | }
12443 | ```

12460 |

12473 |

12482 |

12492 |

12508 | pub trait Contextualize<T> {

12510 | }
12511 |

12513 |     fn context(self, msg: &str) -> std::result::Result<T, FlashError> {

12517 |         })
12518 |     }
12519 | }

12698 | }

12837 |     results: Vec<FileItem>,
12838 |     selected_index: Option<usize>,
12839 |     is_searching: bool,
12840 |     settings: AppSettings,
12841 |     active_tab: Tab,
12842 |     files_indexed: i32,
12843 |     index_size: String,
12844 |     is_dark: bool,
12845 |     search_mode: SearchMode,
12846 |     filter_extension: String,
12847 |     filter_size: String,
12848 |     preview_content: Option<String>,
12849 |     is_loading_preview: bool,
12850 |     rebuild_progress: Option<f32>,
12851 |     rebuild_status: Option<String>,
12852 |     progress_rx: Option<Arc<tokio::sync::Mutex<mpsc::Receiver<ProgressEvent>>>>,
12853 |     tray_icon: Option<tray_icon::TrayIcon>,
12854 |     hotkey_manager: Option<global_hotkey::GlobalHotKeyManager>,
12855 | }
12856 | 
12857 | impl App {
12858 |     fn new(state: Result<Arc<AppState>, String>) -> Self {
12859 |         match state {
12860 |             Ok(state) => {
12861 |                 let settings = state.settings_manager.load().unwrap_or_default();
12862 |                 let stats = state.indexer.get_statistics().unwrap_or_default();
12863 |                 let index_size = format!("{:.1} MB", (stats.total_size_bytes as f64) / 1_048_576.0);
12864 |                 let is_dark = matches!(settings.theme, crate::settings::Theme::Dark);
12865 | 
12866 |                 let mut app = App {
12867 |                     state: Some(state),
12868 |                     error: None,
12869 |                     search_error: None,
12870 |                     search_query: String::new(),
12871 |                     results: Vec::new(),
12872 |                     selected_index: None,
12873 |                     is_searching: false,
12874 |                     settings: settings.clone(),
12875 |                     active_tab: Tab::Search,
12876 |                     files_indexed: stats.total_documents as i32,
12877 |                     index_size,
12878 |                     is_dark,
12879 |                     search_mode: SearchMode::FullText,
12880 |                     filter_extension: String::new(),
12881 |                     filter_size: String::new(),
12882 |                     preview_content: None,
12883 |                     is_loading_preview: false,
12884 |                     rebuild_progress: None,
12885 |                     rebuild_status: None,
12886 |                     progress_rx: None,
12887 |                     tray_icon: crate::system::tray::create_tray_icon().ok(),
12888 |                     hotkey_manager: None,
12889 |                 };
12890 | 
12891 |                 if let Ok(manager) = global_hotkey::GlobalHotKeyManager::new() {
12892 |                     if let Ok(hotkey) = settings
12893 |                         .global_hotkey
12894 |                         .parse::<global_hotkey::hotkey::HotKey>()
12895 |                     {
12896 |                         if manager.register(hotkey).is_err() {
12897 |                             app.error = Some(format!(
12898 |                                 "Hotkey conflict: '{}' is already registered by another application. Please choose an alternative in Settings.",
12899 |                                 settings.global_hotkey
12900 |                             ));
12901 |                         }
12902 |                     } else if !settings.global_hotkey.is_empty() {
12903 |                         app.error = Some(format!(
12904 |                             "Invalid hotkey format: '{}'",
12905 |                             settings.global_hotkey
12906 |                         ));
12907 |                     }
12908 |                     app.hotkey_manager = Some(manager);
12909 |                 }
12910 | 
12911 |                 app
12912 |             }
12913 |             Err(err_msg) => App {
12914 |                 state: None,
12915 |                 error: Some(err_msg),
12916 |                 search_error: None,
12917 |                 search_query: String::new(),
12918 |                 results: Vec::new(),
12919 |                 selected_index: None,
12920 |                 is_searching: false,
12921 |                 settings: AppSettings::default(),
12922 |                 active_tab: Tab::Search,
12923 |                 files_indexed: 0,
12924 |                 index_size: "0 MB".to_string(),
12925 |                 is_dark: false,
12926 |                 search_mode: SearchMode::FullText,
12927 |                 filter_extension: String::new(),
12928 |                 filter_size: String::new(),
12929 |                 preview_content: None,
12930 |                 is_loading_preview: false,
12931 |                 rebuild_progress: None,
12932 |                 rebuild_status: None,
12933 |                 progress_rx: None,
12934 |                 tray_icon: crate::system::tray::create_tray_icon().ok(),
12935 |                 hotkey_manager: None,
12936 |             },
12937 |         }
12938 |     }
12939 | 
12940 |     fn parse_size_filter(size_str: &str) -> (Option<u64>, Option<u64>) {
12941 |         let size_str = size_str.trim();
12942 |         if size_str.is_empty() {
12943 |             return (None, None);
12944 |         }
12945 | 
12946 |         let (op, num_str) = if let Some(stripped) = size_str.strip_prefix(">=") {
12947 |             (">=", stripped)
12948 |         } else if let Some(stripped) = size_str.strip_prefix("<=") {
12949 |             ("<=", stripped)
12950 |         } else if let Some(stripped) = size_str.strip_prefix(">") {
12951 |             (">", stripped)
12952 |         } else if let Some(stripped) = size_str.strip_prefix("<") {
12953 |             ("<", stripped)
12954 |         } else {
12955 |             (">=", size_str)
12956 |         };
12957 | 
12958 |         let num_str = num_str.trim();
12959 |         let multiplier: u64 = if num_str.ends_with("KB") {
12960 |             1024
12961 |         } else if num_str.ends_with("MB") {
12962 |             1024 * 1024
12963 |         } else if num_str.ends_with("GB") {
12964 |             1024 * 1024 * 1024
12965 |         } else {
12966 |             1
12967 |         };
12968 | 
12969 |         let num: u64 = num_str
12970 |             .trim_end_matches(|c: char| c.is_alphabetic())
12971 |             .parse()
12972 |             .unwrap_or(0);
12973 |         let bytes = num * multiplier;
12974 | 
12975 |         match op {
12976 |             ">" => (Some(bytes + 1), None),
12977 |             "<" => (None, Some(bytes.saturating_sub(1))),
12978 |             ">=" => (Some(bytes), None),
12979 |             "<=" => (None, Some(bytes)),
12980 |             _ => (Some(bytes), None),
12981 |         }
12982 |     }
12983 | 
12984 |     fn perform_search(&mut self) -> Task<Message> {
12985 |         let state = match &self.state {
12986 |             Some(s) => s.clone(),
12987 |             None => return Task::none(),
12988 |         };
12989 | 
12990 |         let query = self.search_query.clone();
12991 |         let max_results = self.settings.max_results;
12992 |         let mode = self.search_mode.clone();
12993 |         let extension = if self.filter_extension.is_empty() {
12994 |             None
12995 |         } else {
12996 |             Some(vec![self.filter_extension.clone()])
12997 |         };
12998 |         let (min_size, max_size) = Self::parse_size_filter(&self.filter_size);
12999 | 
13000 |         self.is_searching = true;
13001 |         self.results.clear();
13002 |         self.preview_content = None;
13003 | 
13004 |         Task::future(async move {
13005 |             let result = match mode {
13006 |                 SearchMode::Filename => {
13007 |                     match search_filenames_internal(query, max_results, &state).await {
13008 |                         Ok(results) => Message::SearchResultsReceived(
13009 |                             results.into_iter().map(FileItem::from).collect(),
13010 |                         ),
13011 |                         Err(e) => Message::SearchError(e.to_string()),
13012 |                     }
13013 |                 }
13014 |                 SearchMode::FullText => {
13015 |                     match search_query_internal(
13016 |                         query,
13017 |                         max_results,
13018 |                         &state,
13019 |                         min_size,
13020 |                         max_size,
13021 |                         extension,
13022 |                     )
13023 |                     .await
13024 |                     {
13025 |                         Ok(results) => Message::SearchResultsReceived(
13026 |                             results.into_iter().map(FileItem::from).collect(),
13027 |                         ),
13028 |                         Err(e) => Message::SearchError(e.to_string()),
13029 |                     }
13030 |                 }
13031 |             };
13032 |             result
13033 |         })
13034 |     }
13035 | 
13036 |     fn load_preview(&mut self) -> Task<Message> {
13037 |         let idx = match self.selected_index {
13038 |             Some(i) => i,
13039 |             None => return Task::none(),
13040 |         };
13041 | 
13042 |         let item = match self.results.get(idx) {
13043 |             Some(i) => i.clone(),
13044 |             None => return Task::none(),
13045 |         };
13046 | 
13047 |         let path = item.path.clone();
13048 |         let query = self.search_query.clone();
13049 |         self.is_loading_preview = true;
13050 | 
13051 |         Task::future(async move {
13052 |             let preview = match get_file_preview_highlighted_internal(path, query).await {
13053 |                 Ok(result) => Some(result.content),
13054 |                 Err(_) => None,
13055 |             };
13056 |             Message::PreviewLoaded(preview)
13057 |         })
13058 |     }
13059 | 
13060 |     fn save_settings(&self) {
13061 |         if let Some(state) = &self.state {
13062 |             let _ = state.settings_manager.save(&self.settings);
13063 |         }
13064 |     }
13065 | }
13066 | 
13067 | fn update(app: &mut App, message: Message) -> Task<Message> {
13068 |     if app.error.is_some() {
13069 |         match message {
13070 |             Message::DismissError => {
13071 |                 app.error = None;
13072 |                 Task::none()
13073 |             }
13074 |             Message::Quit => {
13075 |                 std::process::exit(0);
13076 |             }
13077 |             _ => Task::none(),
13078 |         }
13079 |     } else {
13080 |         match message {
13081 |             Message::SearchQueryChanged(q) => {
13082 |                 app.search_query = q;
13083 |                 Task::none()
13084 |             }
13085 |             Message::SearchSubmitted => app.perform_search(),
13086 |             Message::SearchResultsReceived(results) => {
13087 |                 app.results = results;
13088 |                 app.is_searching = false;
13089 |                 app.search_error = None;
13090 |                 if !app.results.is_empty() {
13091 |                     app.selected_index = Some(0);
13092 |                 }
13093 |                 app.load_preview()
13094 |             }
13095 |             Message::SearchError(err) => {
13096 |                 app.search_error = Some(err);
13097 |                 app.is_searching = false;
13098 |                 app.results.clear();
13099 |                 Task::none()
13100 |             }
13101 |             Message::ResultSelected(idx) => {
13102 |                 app.selected_index = Some(idx);
13103 |                 app.load_preview()
13104 |             }
13105 |             Message::OpenFile(path) => {
13106 |                 let p = PathBuf::from(&path);
13107 |                 if p.is_absolute() && p.exists() {
13108 |                     let _ = opener::open(p);
13109 |                 } else {
13110 |                     tracing::warn!("Blocked attempt to open invalid or relative path: {}", path);
13111 |                 }
13112 |                 Task::none()
13113 |             }
13114 |             Message::CopyPath(path) => {
13115 |                 if let Ok(mut clipboard) = arboard::Clipboard::new() {
13116 |                     let _ = clipboard.set_text(&path);
13117 |                 }
13118 |                 Task::none()
13119 |             }
13120 |             Message::TabChanged(tab) => {
13121 |                 app.active_tab = tab;
13122 |                 Task::none()
13123 |             }
13124 |             Message::RebuildIndex => {
13125 |                 let state = match &app.state {
13126 |                     Some(s) => s.clone(),
13127 |                     None => return Task::none(),
13128 |                 };
13129 |                 let settings = app.settings.clone();
13130 |                 app.rebuild_progress = Some(0.0);
13131 |                 app.rebuild_status = Some("Starting rebuild...".to_string());
13132 |                 if let Some(tray) = &app.tray_icon {
13133 |                     let _ = tray.set_tooltip(Some("Flash Search - Rebuilding Index..."));
13134 |                 }
13135 |                 app.files_indexed = 0;
13136 |                 let rx = app.progress_rx.clone();
13137 |                 Task::batch(vec![
13138 |                     Task::future(async move {
13139 |                         let _ = state.indexer.clear();
13140 |                         let _ = state.indexer.commit();
13141 |                         let _ = state.metadata_db.clear();
13142 |                         for dir in settings.index_dirs {
13143 |                             let _ = state
13144 |                                 .scanner
13145 |                                 .scan_directory(
13146 |                                     PathBuf::from(dir),
13147 |                                     settings.exclude_patterns.clone(),
13148 |                                 )
13149 |                                 .await;
13150 |                         }
13151 |                         Message::IndexRebuilt
13152 |                     }),
13153 |                     Task::perform(
13154 |                         async move {
13155 |                             if let Some(r) = rx {
13156 |                                 let mut g = r.lock().await;
13157 |                                 g.recv().await
13158 |                             } else {
13159 |                                 None
13160 |                             }
13161 |                         },
13162 |                         Message::PollProgressResult,
13163 |                     ),
13164 |                 ])
13165 |             }
13166 |             Message::PollProgressResult(Some(event)) => {
13167 |                 let p = if event.total > 0 {
13168 |                     (event.processed as f32) / (event.total as f32)
13169 |                 } else {
13170 |                     0.0
13171 |                 };
13172 |                 app.rebuild_progress = Some(p);
13173 |                 app.rebuild_status = Some(event.status.clone());
13174 |                 app.files_indexed = event.processed as i32;
13175 | 
13176 |                 let rx = app.progress_rx.clone();
13177 |                 Task::perform(
13178 |                     async move {
13179 |                         if let Some(r) = rx {
13180 |                             let mut g = r.lock().await;
13181 |                             g.recv().await
13182 |                         } else {
13183 |                             None
13184 |                         }
13185 |                     },
13186 |                     Message::PollProgressResult,
13187 |                 )
13188 |             }
13189 |             Message::PollProgressResult(None) => Task::none(),
13190 |             Message::RebuildProgress(_) => Task::none(), // Fallback
13191 |             Message::IndexRebuilt => {
13192 |                 let stats = app
13193 |                     .state
13194 |                     .as_ref()
13195 |                     .map(|s| s.indexer.get_statistics().unwrap_or_default())
13196 |                     .unwrap_or_default();
13197 |                 app.files_indexed = stats.total_documents as i32;
13198 |                 app.index_size = format!("{:.1} MB", (stats.total_size_bytes as f64) / 1_048_576.0);
13199 |                 if let Some(tray) = &app.tray_icon {
13200 |                     let _ = tray.set_tooltip(Some("Flash Search - Ready"));
13201 |                 }
13202 |                 app.rebuild_progress = None;
13203 |                 app.rebuild_status = None;
13204 |                 Task::none()
13205 |             }
13206 |             Message::AddFolder => Task::perform(
13207 |                 async {
13208 |                     rfd::AsyncFileDialog::new()
13209 |                         .pick_folder()
13210 |                         .await
13211 |                         .map(|p| p.path().to_string_lossy().to_string())
13212 |                 },
13213 |                 Message::FolderPicked,
13214 |             ),
13215 |             Message::FolderPicked(Some(f)) => {
13216 |                 if !app.settings.index_dirs.iter().any(|d| d == &f) {
13217 |                     app.settings.index_dirs.push(f);
13218 |                     app.save_settings();
13219 |                 }
13220 |                 Task::none()
13221 |             }
13222 |             Message::FolderPicked(None) => Task::none(),
13223 |             Message::RemoveFolder(i) => {
13224 |                 if i < app.settings.index_dirs.len() {
13225 |                     app.settings.index_dirs.remove(i);
13226 |                 }
13227 |                 Task::none()
13228 |             }
13229 |             Message::SaveSettings => {
13230 |                 app.save_settings();
13231 |                 Task::none()
13232 |             }
13233 |             Message::MaxResultsChanged(val) => {
13234 |                 if let Ok(num) = val.parse() {
13235 |                     app.settings.max_results = num;
13236 |                 }
13237 |                 Task::none()
13238 |             }
13239 |             Message::ExcludePatternsChanged(val) => {
13240 |                 app.settings.exclude_patterns =
13241 |                     val.split(',').map(|s| s.trim().to_string()).collect();
13242 |                 Task::none()
13243 |             }
13244 |             Message::ToggleTheme => {
13245 |                 app.is_dark = !app.is_dark;
13246 |                 app.settings.theme = if app.is_dark {
13247 |                     crate::settings::Theme::Dark
13248 |                 } else {
13249 |                     crate::settings::Theme::Light
13250 |                 };
13251 |                 app.save_settings();
13252 |                 Task::none()
13253 |             }
13254 |             Message::ToggleMinimizeToTray(enabled) => {
13255 |                 app.settings.minimize_to_tray = enabled;
13256 |                 app.save_settings();
13257 |                 Task::none()
13258 |             }
13259 |             Message::ToggleAutoStart(enabled) => {
13260 |                 app.settings.auto_start_on_boot = enabled;
13261 |                 app.save_settings();
13262 |                 let _ = crate::system::startup::set_auto_start(enabled);
13263 |                 Task::none()
13264 |             }
13265 |             Message::ToggleContextMenu(enabled) => {
13266 |                 app.settings.context_menu_enabled = enabled;
13267 |                 app.save_settings();
13268 |                 let _ = crate::system::context_menu::register_context_menu(enabled);
13269 |                 Task::none()
13270 |             }
13271 |             Message::ToggleSearchMode => {
13272 |                 app.search_mode = match app.search_mode {
13273 |                     SearchMode::FullText => SearchMode::Filename,
13274 |                     SearchMode::Filename => SearchMode::FullText,
13275 |                 };
13276 |                 if !app.search_query.is_empty() {
13277 |                     app.perform_search()
13278 |                 } else {
13279 |                     Task::none()
13280 |                 }
13281 |             }
13282 |             Message::FilterExtensionChanged(ext) => {
13283 |                 app.filter_extension = ext;
13284 |                 Task::none()
13285 |             }
13286 |             Message::FilterSizeChanged(size) => {
13287 |                 app.filter_size = size;
13288 |                 Task::none()
13289 |             }
13290 |             Message::PreviewRequested(idx) => {
13291 |                 app.selected_index = Some(idx);
13292 |                 app.load_preview()
13293 |             }
13294 |             Message::PreviewLoaded(content) => {
13295 |                 app.preview_content = content;
13296 |                 app.is_loading_preview = false;
13297 |                 Task::none()
13298 |             }
13299 |             Message::MoveUp => {
13300 |                 if let Some(current) = app.selected_index {
13301 |                     if current > 0 {
13302 |                         app.selected_index = Some(current - 1);
13303 |                         return app.load_preview();
13304 |                     }
13305 |                 }
13306 |                 Task::none()
13307 |             }
13308 |             Message::MoveDown => {
13309 |                 if let Some(current) = app.selected_index {
13310 |                     if !app.results.is_empty() && current < app.results.len() - 1 {
13311 |                         app.selected_index = Some(current + 1);
13312 |                         return app.load_preview();
13313 |                     }
13314 |                 }
13315 |                 Task::none()
13316 |             }
13317 |             Message::DismissError => Task::none(),
13318 |             Message::Quit => {
13319 |                 std::process::exit(0);
13320 |             }
13321 |             Message::GlobalHotkeyChanged(val) => {
13322 |                 app.settings.global_hotkey = val;
13323 |                 Task::none()
13324 |             }
13325 |             Message::StartPollingProgress => Task::none(),
13326 |             Message::PollHotkey => {
13327 |                 if let Ok(event) = global_hotkey::GlobalHotKeyEvent::receiver().try_recv() {
13328 |                     // Hotkey pressed, we just log it or toggle search window focus
13329 |                     tracing::info!("Global hotkey pressed: {:?}", event);
13330 |                     // To truly bring Iced to front, we'd need to use Iced window commands,
13331 |                     // but since iced 0.13 removed some easy window visibility toggles without IDs,
13332 |                     // we'll just focus the search query for now, or just let OS handle if hooked.
13333 |                 }
13334 |                 Task::none()
13335 |             }
13336 |             Message::PollTray => {
13337 |                 if let Ok(event) = tray_icon::menu::MenuEvent::receiver().try_recv() {
13338 |                     if event.id.0 == "quit" {
13339 |                         std::process::exit(0);
13340 |                     } else if event.id.0 == "show" {
13341 |                         // TODO: Map to actual window focus task if needed
13342 |                     }
13343 |                 }
13344 |                 Task::none()
13345 |             }
13346 |         }
13347 |     }
13348 | }
13349 | 
13350 | fn subscription(_app: &App) -> Subscription<Message> {
13351 |     let subs = vec![
13352 |         iced::time::every(std::time::Duration::from_millis(100)).map(|_| Message::PollHotkey),
13353 |         iced::time::every(std::time::Duration::from_millis(100)).map(|_| Message::PollTray),
13354 |     ];
13355 | 
13356 |     Subscription::batch(subs)
13357 | }
13358 | 
13359 | fn view(app: &App) -> Element<'_, Message> {
13360 |     match app.active_tab {
13361 |         Tab::Search => search::search_view(app),
13362 |         Tab::Settings => settings::settings_view(app),
13363 |     }
13364 | }
13365 | 
13366 | #[allow(dead_code)]
13367 | fn error_view(error: &str) -> Element<'_, Message> {
13368 |     use iced::widget::{button, column, container, text, Space};
13369 |     use iced::{Alignment, Length, Padding};
13370 | 
13371 |     container(
13372 |         column![
13373 |             text("An Error Occurred").size(24),
13374 |             Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(16.0)),
13375 |             text(error).size(14),
13376 |             Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(24.0)),
13377 |             button(text("Dismiss"))
13378 |                 .on_press(Message::DismissError)
13379 |                 .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13380 |         ]
13381 |         .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13382 |     )
13383 |     .width(Length::Fill)
13384 |     .height(Length::Fill)
13385 |     .center_x(Length::Fill)
13386 |     .center_y(Length::Fill)
13387 |     .into()
13388 | }
13389 | 
13390 | fn app_title(_app: &App) -> String {
13391 |     String::from("Flash Search")
13392 | }
13393 | 
13394 | fn app_theme(app: &App) -> iced::Theme {
13395 |     if app.is_dark {
13396 |         iced::Theme::Dark
13397 |     } else {
13398 |         iced::Theme::Light
13399 |     }
13400 | }
13401 | 
13402 | pub fn run_ui(
13403 |     state: Result<std::sync::Arc<AppState>, String>,
13404 |     progress_rx: mpsc::Receiver<ProgressEvent>,
13405 | ) {
13406 |     let progress_mutex = Arc::new(tokio::sync::Mutex::new(progress_rx));
13407 | 
13408 |     iced::application(
13409 |         move || {
13410 |             let mut app = App::new(state.clone());
13411 |             app.progress_rx = Some(progress_mutex.clone());
13412 |             (app, Task::none())
13413 |         },
13414 |         update,
13415 |         view,
13416 |     )
13417 |     .title(app_title)
13418 |     .theme(app_theme)
13419 |     .subscription(subscription)
13420 |     .window(iced::window::Settings {
13421 |         size: iced::Size::new(1000.0, 700.0),
13422 |         position: iced::window::Position::Centered,
13423 |         ..Default::default()
13424 |     })
13425 |     .run()
13426 |     .unwrap();
13427 | }

13454 | fn load_icon(icon_name: &str) -> iced::widget::Svg<'_> {
13455 |     let svg_data = match icon_name {
13456 |         "search" => SEARCH_ICON_SVG,
13457 |         "file" => FILE_ICON_SVG,
13458 |         "settings" => SETTINGS_ICON_SVG,
13459 |         "refresh" => REFRESH_ICON_SVG,
13460 |         "sun" => SUN_ICON_SVG,
13461 |         "moon" => MOON_ICON_SVG,
13462 |         _ => SEARCH_ICON_SVG,
13463 |     };
13464 |     svg::Svg::new(svg::Handle::from_memory(svg_data.as_bytes()))
13465 | }
13466 | 
13467 | pub fn search_view(app: &App) -> Element<'_, Message> {
13468 |     let mode_text = match app.search_mode {
13469 |         SearchMode::FullText => "Full Text",
13470 |         SearchMode::Filename => "Filename",
13471 |     };
13472 | 
13473 |     let search_icon = container(load_icon("search")).padding(Padding::new(12.0));
13474 | 
13475 |     let input = TextInput::new("Search files...", &app.search_query)
13476 |         .on_input(Message::SearchQueryChanged)
13477 |         .on_submit(Message::SearchSubmitted)
13478 |         .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13479 |         .size(16)
13480 |         .style(theme::search_input())
13481 |         .width(Length::Fill);
13482 | 
13483 |     let search_btn = button(container(load_icon("search")).padding(Padding::new(8.0)))
13484 |         .on_press(Message::SearchSubmitted)
13485 |         .style(theme::primary_button())
13486 |         .padding(Padding::new(12.0));
13487 | 
13488 |     let search_bar = row![search_icon, input, search_btn]
13489 |         .spacing(0)
13490 |         .align_y(Alignment::Center)
13491 |         .width(Length::Fill);
13492 | 
13493 |     let search_bar_container = container(search_bar)
13494 |         .style(theme::input_container)
13495 |         .width(Length::Fill);
13496 | 
13497 |     let error_display: Element<Message> = if let Some(ref err) = app.search_error {
13498 |         container(
13499 |             row![
13500 |                 container(load_icon("settings")).style(|_theme| theme::error_container_style()),
13501 |                 text(err).size(13).style(|_theme| theme::error_text_style()),
13502 |                 Space::new().width(Length::Fill),
13503 |                 button("Dismiss")
13504 |                     .on_press(Message::DismissError)
13505 |                     .padding(Padding::new(4.0))
13506 |                     .style(theme::secondary_button())
13507 |             ]
13508 |             .spacing(8)
13509 |             .align_y(Alignment::Center),
13510 |         )
13511 |         .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13512 |         .style(theme::error_container)
13513 |         .width(Length::Fill)
13514 |         .into()
13515 |     } else {
13516 |         Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(0.0)).into()
13517 |     };
13518 | 
13519 |     let filter_ext = TextInput::new("ext:pdf", &app.filter_extension)
13520 |         .on_input(Message::FilterExtensionChanged)
13521 |         .on_submit(Message::SearchSubmitted)
13522 |         .padding(Padding::new(8.0))
13523 |         .size(13)
13524 |         .width(Length::Fixed(100.0))
13525 |         .style(theme::small_input());
13526 | 
13527 |     let filter_size = TextInput::new("size:>1MB", &app.filter_size)
13528 |         .on_input(Message::FilterSizeChanged)
13529 |         .on_submit(Message::SearchSubmitted)
13530 |         .padding(Padding::new(8.0))
13531 |         .size(13)
13532 |         .width(Length::Fixed(100.0))
13533 |         .style(theme::small_input());
13534 | 
13535 |     let mode_btn = button(text(mode_text).size(13))
13536 |         .on_press(Message::ToggleSearchMode)
13537 |         .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13538 |         .style(theme::secondary_button());
13539 | 
13540 |     let theme_btn = button(if app.is_dark {
13541 |         container(load_icon("sun"))
13542 |     } else {
13543 |         container(load_icon("moon"))
13544 |     })
13545 |     .on_press(Message::ToggleTheme)
13546 |     .padding(Padding::new(10.0))
13547 |     .style(theme::icon_button());
13548 | 
13549 |     let sep1 = container(
13550 |         Space::new()
13551 |             .width(Length::Fixed(1.0))
13552 |             .height(Length::Fixed(20.0)),
13553 |     );
13554 | 
13555 |     let rebuild_display: Element<_> = if let Some(progress) = app.rebuild_progress {
13556 |         let status = app.rebuild_status.as_deref().unwrap_or("Rebuilding...");
13557 |         column![text(status).size(12), progress_bar(0.0..=1.0, progress),]
13558 |             .spacing(4)
13559 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center)
13560 |             .width(Length::Fixed(120.0))
13561 |             .into()
13562 |     } else {
13563 |         button(row![container(load_icon("refresh")), text("Rebuild").size(13)].spacing(6))
13564 |             .on_press(Message::RebuildIndex)
13565 |             .padding(Padding::new(10.0))
13566 |             .style(theme::secondary_button())
13567 |             .into()
13568 |     };
13569 | 
13570 |     let settings_btn = button(container(load_icon("settings")).padding(Padding::new(4.0)))
13571 |         .on_press(Message::TabChanged(Tab::Settings))
13572 |         .padding(Padding::new(10.0))
13573 |         .style(theme::icon_button());
13574 | 
13575 |     let stats = text(format!("{} files | {}", app.files_indexed, app.index_size)).size(13);
13576 | 
13577 |     let filter_group = row![mode_btn, sep1, filter_ext, filter_size,]
13578 |         .spacing(8)
13579 |         .align_y(Alignment::Center);
13580 | 
13581 |     let toolbar_spacer = Space::new().width(Length::Fixed(16.0));
13582 | 
13583 |     let filter_row = row![
13584 |         filter_group,
13585 |         Space::new().width(Length::Fill),
13586 |         stats,
13587 |         toolbar_spacer,
13588 |         theme_btn,
13589 |         rebuild_display,
13590 |         settings_btn
13591 |     ]
13592 |     .spacing(8)
13593 |     .align_y(Alignment::Center)
13594 |     .width(Length::Fill);
13595 | 
13596 |     let top_section = container(
13597 |         column![search_bar_container, error_display, filter_row]
13598 |             .spacing(12)
13599 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13600 |     )
13601 |     .style(theme::top_bar_container)
13602 |     .padding(Padding::new(16.0))
13603 |     .width(Length::Fill);
13604 | 
13605 |     let results_panel: Element<Message> = if app.settings.index_dirs.is_empty() {
13606 |         container(
13607 |             column![
13608 |                 container(load_icon("settings")),
13609 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(16.0)),
13610 |                 text("Add a folder to get started").size(24),
13611 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(8.0)),
13612 |                 text("Configure your indexed directories in Settings.").size(14),
13613 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(24.0)),
13614 |                 button(text("Go to Settings").size(16))
13615 |                     .on_press(Message::TabChanged(Tab::Settings))
13616 |                     .padding(Padding::new(14.0))
13617 |                     .style(theme::primary_button()),
13618 |             ]
13619 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13620 |         )
13621 |         .width(Length::Fill)
13622 |         .height(Length::Fill)
13623 |         .center_x(Length::Fill)
13624 |         .center_y(Length::Fill)
13625 |         .into()
13626 |     } else if app.is_searching {
13627 |         container(column![text("Searching...").size(14),].align_x(Alignment::Center))
13628 |             .width(Length::Fill)
13629 |             .height(Length::Fill)
13630 |             .center_x(Length::Fill)
13631 |             .center_y(Length::Fill)
13632 |             .into()
13633 |     } else if app.results.is_empty() && !app.search_query.is_empty() {
13634 |         container(
13635 |             column![
13636 |                 text("No results found").size(16),
13637 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(8.0)),
13638 |                 text("Try adjusting your search terms").size(13),
13639 |             ]
13640 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13641 |         )
13642 |         .width(Length::Fill)
13643 |         .height(Length::Fill)
13644 |         .center_x(Length::Fill)
13645 |         .center_y(Length::Fill)
13646 |         .into()
13647 |     } else if app.results.is_empty() {
13648 |         container(
13649 |             column![
13650 |                 container(load_icon("search")),
13651 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(12.0)),
13652 |                 text("Start searching").size(16),
13653 |                 text("Enter keywords to find files").size(13),
13654 |             ]
13655 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13656 |         )
13657 |         .width(Length::Fill)
13658 |         .height(Length::Fill)
13659 |         .center_x(Length::Fill)
13660 |         .center_y(Length::Fill)
13661 |         .into()
13662 |     } else {
13663 |         let items: Vec<_> = app
13664 |             .results
13665 |             .iter()
13666 |             .enumerate()
13667 |             .map(|(i, item)| {
13668 |                 let ext_str = item.extension.as_deref().unwrap_or("");
13669 |                 let is_selected = app.selected_index == Some(i);
13670 | 
13671 |                 let dir = std::path::Path::new(&item.path)
13672 |                     .parent()
13673 |                     .map(|p| p.to_string_lossy().to_string())
13674 |                     .unwrap_or_default();
13675 | 
13676 |                 let file_icon = container(load_icon("file")).padding(Padding::new(8.0));
13677 | 
13678 |                 let ext_badge =
13679 |                     container(text(ext_str.to_uppercase()).size(10)).padding(Padding::new(4.0));
13680 | 
13681 |                 let score_text = format!("{:.1}", item.score * 100.0);
13682 |                 let score_badge =
13683 |                     container(text(format!("{}%", score_text)).size(10)).padding(Padding::new(4.0));
13684 | 
13685 |                 let header = row![
13686 |                     file_icon,
13687 |                     text(&item.title).size(15),
13688 |                     Space::new().width(Length::Fill),
13689 |                     score_badge,
13690 |                     ext_badge,
13691 |                 ]
13692 |                 .align_y(Alignment::Center);
13693 | 
13694 |                 let body = text(dir).size(12);
13695 | 
13696 |                 let card_content = column![header, body].spacing(4).align_x(Alignment::Start);
13697 | 
13698 |                 let card = container(card_content)
13699 |                     .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13700 |                     .width(Length::Fill);
13701 | 
13702 |                 let card_container = if is_selected {
13703 |                     container(card).style(theme::result_card_hover)
13704 |                 } else {
13705 |                     container(card).style(theme::result_card_normal)
13706 |                 };
13707 | 
13708 |                 let button_style = theme::result_button(is_selected);
13709 | 
13710 |                 button(card_container)
13711 |                     .on_press(Message::ResultSelected(i))
13712 |                     .width(Length::Fill)
13713 |                     .padding(Padding::new(0.0))
13714 |                     .style(button_style)
13715 |                     .into()
13716 |             })
13717 |             .collect();
13718 |         let list = Scrollable::new(column(items).spacing(8)).height(Length::Fill);
13719 |         container(list)
13720 |             .padding(Padding::new(12.0))
13721 |             .width(Length::Fill)
13722 |             .height(Length::Fill)
13723 |             .into()
13724 |     };
13725 | 
13726 |     let preview_panel: Element<Message> = if app.is_loading_preview {
13727 |         container(column![text("Loading preview...").size(14),].align_x(Alignment::Center))
13728 |             .width(Length::Fill)
13729 |             .height(Length::Fill)
13730 |             .center_x(Length::Fill)
13731 |             .center_y(Length::Fill)
13732 |             .into()
13733 |     } else if let Some(ref preview) = app.preview_content {
13734 |         let scroll = Scrollable::new(
13735 |             container(text(preview).size(14))
13736 |                 .padding(Padding::new(20.0))
13737 |                 .width(Length::Fill),
13738 |         )
13739 |         .height(Length::Fill);
13740 | 
13741 |         container(scroll)
13742 |             .width(Length::Fill)
13743 |             .height(Length::Fill)
13744 |             .into()
13745 |     } else {
13746 |         container(
13747 |             column![
13748 |                 container(load_icon("file")),
13749 |                 Space::new().height(Length::Fixed(12.0)),
13750 |                 text("Select a file to preview").size(14),
13751 |             ]
13752 |             .align_x(Alignment::Center),
13753 |         )
13754 |         .width(Length::Fill)
13755 |         .height(Length::Fill)
13756 |         .center_x(Length::Fill)
13757 |         .center_y(Length::Fill)
13758 |         .into()
13759 |     };
13760 | 
13761 |     let preview_panel_container = container(preview_panel)
13762 |         .style(theme::sidebar_container)
13763 |         .width(Length::FillPortion(3))
13764 |         .height(Length::Fill);
13765 | 
13766 |     let split_pane = row![
13767 |         container(results_panel)

13769 |             .height(Length::Fill),
13770 |         preview_panel_container
13771 |     ]
13772 |     .width(Length::Fill)
13773 |     .height(Length::Fill);
13774 | 
13775 |     container(
13776 |         column![top_section, split_pane]
13777 |             .width(Length::Fill)
13778 |             .height(Length::Fill),
13779 |     )
13780 |     .style(theme::main_content_container)
13781 |     .width(Length::Fill)
13782 |     .height(Length::Fill)
13783 |     .into()
13784 | }

14257 | #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone)]

14270 | pub struct FilenameIndexStats {

14272 |     pub index_size_bytes: u64,
14273 | }
14274 | 
14275 | /// File extension for the binary index file
14276 | const INDEX_FILENAME: &str = "filenames.bin";
14277 | /// Legacy JSON filename for migration
14278 | const LEGACY_INDEX_FILENAME: &str = "filenames.json";
14279 | 
14280 | pub struct FilenameIndex {
14281 |     entries: Arc<RwLock<Vec<FilenameEntry>>>,
14282 |     data_path: std::path::PathBuf,
14283 |     fst_map: Arc<RwLock<Vec<u8>>>,
14284 | }
14285 | 
14286 | impl FilenameIndex {
14287 |     pub fn open(data_path: &Path) -> Result<Self> {
14288 |         let data_path = data_path.to_path_buf();
14289 | 
14290 |         let entries = if data_path.exists() {
14291 |             // Try bincode first, then fall back to legacy JSON
14292 |             let bin_path = data_path.join(INDEX_FILENAME);
14293 |             let json_path = data_path.join(LEGACY_INDEX_FILENAME);
14294 | 
14295 |             if bin_path.exists() {
14296 |                 match std::fs::read(&bin_path) {
14297 |                     Ok(bytes) => {
14298 |                         match bincode::serde::decode_from_slice(&bytes, bincode::config::standard())
14299 |                         {
14300 |                             Ok((entries, _)) => {
14301 |                                 let entries: Vec<FilenameEntry> = entries;
14302 |                                 tracing::info!(
14303 |                                     "Loaded {} filenames from bincode index",
14304 |                                     entries.len()
14305 |                                 );
14306 |                                 entries
14307 |                             }
14308 |                             Err(e) => {
14309 |                                 tracing::warn!("Failed to parse bincode filename index: {}", e);
14310 |                                 Vec::new()
14311 |                             }
14312 |                         }
14313 |                     }
14314 |                     Err(_) => Vec::new(),
14315 |                 }
14316 |             } else if json_path.exists() {
14317 |                 // Migrate from legacy JSON
14318 |                 match std::fs::read_to_string(&json_path) {
14319 |                     Ok(content) => match serde_json::from_str::<Vec<FilenameEntry>>(&content) {
14320 |                         Ok(entries) => {
14321 |                             tracing::info!(
14322 |                                 "Migrated {} filenames from legacy JSON index",
14323 |                                 entries.len()
14324 |                             );
14325 |                             // Save as bincode immediately and remove JSON
14326 |                             Self::save_to_disk_sync(&entries, &data_path);
14327 |                             let _ = std::fs::remove_file(&json_path);
14328 |                             entries
14329 |                         }
14330 |                         Err(e) => {
14331 |                             tracing::warn!("Failed to parse legacy JSON filename index: {}", e);
14332 |                             Vec::new()
14333 |                         }
14334 |                     },
14335 |                     Err(_) => Vec::new(),
14336 |                 }
14337 |             } else {
14338 |                 Vec::new()
14339 |             }
14340 |         } else {
14341 |             Vec::new()
14342 |         };
14343 | 
14344 |         let fst_map = Arc::new(RwLock::new(Self::build_fst(&entries)));
14345 | 
14346 |         Ok(Self {
14347 |             entries: Arc::new(RwLock::new(entries)),
14348 |             data_path,
14349 |             fst_map,
14350 |         })
14351 |     }
14352 | 
14353 |     pub fn add_file(&self, path: &str, name: &str) -> Result<()> {
14354 |         let entry = FilenameEntry {
14355 |             path: path.to_string(),
14356 |             name: name.to_string(),
14357 |         };
14358 | 
14359 |         let entries = self.entries.clone();
14360 | 
14361 |         if let Ok(mut guard) = entries.write() {
14362 |             guard.push(entry);
14363 | 
14364 |             if guard.len() % 1000 == 0 {
14365 |                 let data = guard.clone();
14366 |                 let data_path = self.data_path.clone();
14367 |                 std::thread::spawn(move || {
14368 |                     Self::save_to_disk_sync(&data, &data_path);
14369 |                 });
14370 |             }
14371 |         }
14372 | 
14373 |         Ok(())
14374 |     }
14375 | 
14376 |     pub fn commit(&self) -> Result<()> {
14377 |         let entries = self.entries.clone();
14378 | 
14379 |         if let Ok(guard) = entries.read() {
14380 |             let data_path = self.data_path.clone();
14381 |             let data: Vec<_> = guard
14382 |                 .iter()
14383 |                 .map(|e| FilenameEntry {
14384 |                     path: e.path.clone(),
14385 |                     name: e.name.clone(),
14386 |                 })
14387 |                 .collect();
14388 | 
14389 |             if let Ok(mut fst_guard) = self.fst_map.write() {
14390 |                 *fst_guard = Self::build_fst(&data);
14391 |             }
14392 | 
14393 |             std::thread::spawn(move || {
14394 |                 Self::save_to_disk_sync(&data, &data_path);
14395 |             });
14396 |         }
14397 | 
14398 |         Ok(())
14399 |     }
14400 | 
14401 |     fn build_fst(entries: &[FilenameEntry]) -> Vec<u8> {
14402 |         let mut items: Vec<(String, u64)> = entries
14403 |             .iter()
14404 |             .enumerate()
14405 |             .map(|(i, e)| (format!("{}\0{}", e.name.to_lowercase(), i), i as u64))
14406 |             .collect();
14407 |         items.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.cmp(&b.0));
14408 | 
14409 |         let mut build = fst::MapBuilder::memory();
14410 |         for (k, v) in items {
14411 |             let _ = build.insert(k, v);
14412 |         }
14413 |         build.into_inner().unwrap_or_default()
14414 |     }
14415 | 
14416 |     /// Save entries to disk using bincode (P3: replaces JSON for ~10x smaller + faster)
14417 |     fn save_to_disk_sync(entries: &[FilenameEntry], data_path: &std::path::Path) {
14418 |         match bincode::serde::encode_to_vec(entries, bincode::config::standard()) {
14419 |             Ok(bytes) => {
14420 |                 let _ = std::fs::write(data_path.join(INDEX_FILENAME), bytes);
14421 |             }
14422 |             Err(e) => {
14423 |                 tracing::warn!("Failed to serialize filename index: {}", e);
14424 |             }
14425 |         }
14426 |     }
14427 | 
14428 |     pub fn search(&self, query: &str, limit: usize) -> Result<Vec<FilenameSearchResult>> {
14429 |         let fst_bytes = self.fst_map.read().unwrap();
14430 |         if fst_bytes.is_empty() {
14431 |             return Ok(Vec::new());
14432 |         }
14433 | 
14434 |         // FST Map
14435 |         let map = match fst::Map::new(fst_bytes.clone()) {
14436 |             Ok(m) => m,
14437 |             Err(_) => return Ok(Vec::new()),
14438 |         };
14439 | 
14440 |         // Fuzzy / Subsequence matching
14441 |         let query_lower = query.to_lowercase();
14442 |         let aut = Subsequence::new(&query_lower);
14443 | 
14444 |         let mut stream = map.search(aut).into_stream();
14445 | 
14446 |         let entries_lock = match self.entries.read() {
14447 |             Ok(g) => g,
14448 |             Err(_) => return Ok(Vec::new()),
14449 |         };
14450 | 
14451 |         let mut results = Vec::new();
14452 |         while let Some((_, v)) = stream.next() {
14453 |             if results.len() >= limit {
14454 |                 break;
14455 |             }
14456 |             if let Some(entry) = entries_lock.get(v as usize) {
14457 |                 results.push(FilenameSearchResult {
14458 |                     file_path: entry.path.clone(),
14459 |                     file_name: entry.name.clone(),
14460 |                 });
14461 |             }
14462 |         }
14463 | 
14464 |         Ok(results)
14465 |     }
14466 | 
14467 |     pub fn clear(&self) -> Result<()> {
14468 |         let entries = self.entries.clone();
14469 | 
14470 |         if let Ok(mut guard) = entries.write() {
14471 |             guard.clear();
14472 |             let data_path = self.data_path.clone();
14473 |             std::thread::spawn(move || {
14474 |                 let _ = std::fs::remove_file(data_path.join(INDEX_FILENAME));
14475 |                 let _ = std::fs::remove_file(data_path.join(LEGACY_INDEX_FILENAME));
14476 |             });
14477 |         }
14478 | 
14479 |         Ok(())
14480 |     }
14481 | 
14482 |     pub fn get_stats(&self) -> Result<FilenameIndexStats> {
14483 |         let entries = self.entries.clone();
14484 | 
14485 |         let entries = match entries.read() {
14486 |             Ok(guard) => guard,
14487 |             Err(_) => {
14488 |                 return Ok(FilenameIndexStats {
14489 |                     total_files: 0,
14490 |                     index_size_bytes: 0,
14491 |                 })
14492 |             }
14493 |         };
14494 | 
14495 |         let size: u64 = entries
14496 |             .iter()
14497 |             .map(|e| e.path.len() as u64 + e.name.len() as u64 + 32)
14498 |             .sum();
14499 | 
14500 |         Ok(FilenameIndexStats {
14501 |             total_files: entries.len(),
14502 |             index_size_bytes: size,
14503 |         })
14504 |     }
14505 | 
14506 |     pub fn rebuild_index(&self, paths: Vec<(String, String)>) -> Result<()> {
14507 |         let entries = self.entries.clone();
14508 |         let data_path = self.data_path.clone();
14509 | 
14510 |         if let Ok(mut guard) = entries.write() {
14511 |             *guard = paths
14512 |                 .into_iter()
14513 |                 .map(|(path, name)| FilenameEntry { path, name })
14514 |                 .collect();
14515 | 
14516 |             let data: Vec<_> = guard
14517 |                 .iter()
14518 |                 .map(|e| FilenameEntry {
14519 |                     path: e.path.clone(),
14520 |                     name: e.name.clone(),
14521 |                 })
14522 |                 .collect();
14523 | 
14524 |             if let Ok(mut fst_guard) = self.fst_map.write() {
14525 |                 *fst_guard = Self::build_fst(&data);
14526 |             }
14527 | 
14528 |             std::thread::spawn(move || {
14529 |                 Self::save_to_disk_sync(&data, &data_path);
14530 |             });
14531 |         }
14532 | 
14533 |         Ok(())
14534 |     }
14535 | }
14536 | ```

14561 | 
14562 | fn get_schema_version_path(index_path: &Path) -> PathBuf {
14563 |     index_path.join(".schema_version")
14564 | }
14565 | 
14566 | fn read_schema_version(index_path: &Path) -> Option<String> {
14567 |     std::fs::read_to_string(get_schema_version_path(index_path))
14568 |         .ok()
14569 |         .map(|s| s.trim().to_string())
14570 | }
14571 | 
14572 | fn write_schema_version(index_path: &Path, version: &str) -> Result<()> {
14573 |     std::fs::write(get_schema_version_path(index_path), version).map_err(FlashError::Io)
14574 | }
14575 | 
14576 | /// Central manager for the Tantivy search index
14577 | pub struct IndexManager {
14578 |     #[allow(dead_code)]
14579 |     index: Index,
14580 |     writer: IndexWriterManager,
14581 |     searcher: IndexSearcher,
14582 | }
14583 | 
14584 | impl IndexManager {
14585 |     /// Open or create index at the specified path
14586 |     pub fn open(index_path: &Path, memory_limit_mb: u32) -> Result<Self> {
14587 |         let schema = create_schema();
14588 | 
14589 |         // Ensure directory exists
14590 |         if !index_path.exists() {
14591 |             std::fs::create_dir_all(index_path).map_err(FlashError::Io)?;
14592 |         }
14593 | 
14594 |         // Check schema version - if mismatch, rebuild index
14595 |         let stored_version = read_schema_version(index_path);
14596 |         if let Some(ref ver) = stored_version {
14597 |             if ver != SCHEMA_VERSION {
14598 |                 warn!(
14599 |                     "Schema version mismatch: stored={}, current={}. Rebuilding index...",
14600 |                     ver, SCHEMA_VERSION
14601 |                 );
14602 |                 std::fs::remove_dir_all(index_path).map_err(FlashError::Io)?;
14603 |                 std::fs::create_dir_all(index_path).map_err(FlashError::Io)?;
14604 |                 write_schema_version(index_path, SCHEMA_VERSION)?;
14605 |             }
14606 |         } else if index_path.join("meta.json").exists() {
14607 |             // Old index without version - rebuild
14608 |             warn!("No schema version found. Rebuilding index...");
14609 |             std::fs::remove_dir_all(index_path).map_err(FlashError::Io)?;
14610 |             std::fs::create_dir_all(index_path).map_err(FlashError::Io)?;
14611 |             write_schema_version(index_path, SCHEMA_VERSION)?;
14612 |         } else {
14613 |             // New index - write version
14614 |             write_schema_version(index_path, SCHEMA_VERSION)?;
14615 |         }
14616 | 
14617 |         // Use memory-mapped directory for efficient I/O
14618 |         let directory = MmapDirectory::open(index_path)
14619 |             .map_err(|e| FlashError::index(format!("Failed to open index directory: {}", e)))?;
14620 | 
14621 |         let index = Index::open_or_create(directory, schema.clone())
14622 |             .map_err(|e| FlashError::index(format!("Failed to open or create index: {}", e)))?;
14623 | 
14624 |         info!(
14625 |             "Opened index at {} with schema version {}",
14626 |             index_path.display(),
14627 |             SCHEMA_VERSION
14628 |         );
14629 | 
14630 |         let writer = IndexWriterManager::new(&index, memory_limit_mb)?;
14631 |         let searcher = IndexSearcher::new(&index, index_path.to_path_buf())?;
14632 | 
14633 |         Ok(Self {
14634 |             index,
14635 |             writer,
14636 |             searcher,
14637 |         })
14638 |     }
14639 | 
14640 |     /// Add a document to the index
14641 |     pub fn add_document(&self, doc: &ParsedDocument, modified: u64, size: u64) -> Result<()> {
14642 |         self.writer.add_document(doc, modified, size)
14643 |     }
14644 | 
14645 |     /// Add multiple documents in a single lock acquisition (much more efficient)
14646 |     pub fn add_documents_batch(&self, docs: &[(ParsedDocument, u64, u64)]) -> Result<()> {
14647 |         self.writer.add_documents_batch(docs)
14648 |     }
14649 | 
14650 |     /// Remove a document from the index
14651 |     pub fn remove_document(&self, path: &str) -> Result<()> {
14652 |         self.writer.remove_document(path)
14653 |     }
14654 | 
14655 |     /// Clear all documents from the index
14656 |     pub fn clear(&self) -> Result<()> {
14657 |         self.writer.delete_all_documents()
14658 |     }
14659 | 
14660 |     /// Commit pending changes
14661 |     pub fn commit(&self) -> Result<()> {
14662 |         self.writer.commit()
14663 |     }
14664 | 
14665 |     /// Search the index (async with caching)
14666 |     pub async fn search(
14667 |         &self,
14668 |         query: &str,
14669 |         limit: usize,
14670 |         min_size: Option<u64>,
14671 |         max_size: Option<u64>,
14672 |         file_extensions: Option<&[String]>,
14673 |     ) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>> {
14674 |         self.searcher
14675 |             .search(query, limit, min_size, max_size, file_extensions)
14676 |             .await
14677 |     }
14678 | 
14679 |     /// Invalidate search cache (call after index updates)
14680 |     pub fn invalidate_cache(&self) {
14681 |         self.searcher.invalidate_cache();
14682 |     }
14683 | 
14684 |     /// Get index statistics
14685 |     pub fn get_statistics(&self) -> Result<IndexStatistics> {
14686 |         self.searcher.get_statistics()
14687 |     }
14688 | }
14689 | ```
